item.title: Why Kroger Stock Could Keep Climbing Even After Record Highs
item.description: Kroger's capital return is a value today and for the future, offering substantial upside for investors with the patience to wait.

item.title: Salesforce: A Week After Earnings, the Market Has Spoken
item.description: Salesforce’s stabilizing price action and strong analyst support suggest the stock’s long-awaited recovery rally may finally be beginning.

item.title: Unmanned Profits: The New Kings of the Modern Battlefield
item.description: AeroVironment, Kratos, and Red Cat offer distinct ways to invest in the rise of drone warfare. Here's how their growth profiles, risks, and strategies...

item.title: Costco Wholesale: Buy Now, Get Paid Later as Cash and Returns Build

item.title: 3 Dividend Growth Stocks Quietly Raising Payouts
